# Upstream Source: design

Original upstream folder:

`https://github.com/nextlevelbuilder/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/tree/main/.claude/skills/design`

Expected local source path when the upstream submodule is available:

`external/skills/ui-ux-pro-max-skill/.claude/skills/design`

## Purpose

Comprehensive upstream design skill covering broader design workflows such as brand identity, tokens, UI styling, presentations, banners, icons, and visual deliverables.

## Terranex usage

Use only through the Terranex adapter for UI review and design-intelligence context. Do not use this folder to introduce unrelated visual deliverables, runtime assets, or product behavior.

## Runtime boundary

This folder is reference material only. Do not import it into React runtime code or package it into the app bundle.
